summary: Sprint 5 final benchmark successfully completed with 44.42 tok/s throughput (1.16× over Sprint 4 baseline). All validation assertions passed.

verificationResults.speculativeTests: All passed (n-gram and EAGLE infrastructure validated)

nonBlockingIssues.description: bench_tp4_sprint5_final.py comprehensive benchmark framework is partially complete but needs additional work for full mode integration (AWQ mode, speculative decoding integration into TP engine, batch>1 engine)
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Each mode function in bench_tp4_sprint5_final.py needs to load weights like bench_tp4_sprint5.py does. The simpler bench_tp4_sprint5.py successfully validated the core Sprint 5 throughput target.

sharedStateObservations.observation: GPU testing requires stopping vLLM container first to free VRAM
TP=4 benchmarks use HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 and require 4 MI50 GPUs
Model weights must be loaded before benchmark runs - engine.load_layer_weights() must be called for each layer
